hypothesis: A precursor-based small-molecule inhibitor selectively passivates the non-growth surface while surface grows the target film on the growth surface, achieving >=90% selectivity at 10 nm for passivate a-SiN, grow SiOx-on-a-SiO2 to 90% selectivity at 10 nm.
methodology_citations: Parsons & Clark, Area-selective deposition, Chem. Mater. 2020, 32, 4920
Tezsevin et al., Aniline SMI DFT+RSA, Langmuir 2023, 10.1021/acs.langmuir.2c03214
Area-Selective ALD of Al2O3 with MSA inhibitor, 10.1021/acs.chemmater.4c02902
Dehydroxylated amorphous silica slab models, PCCP 2025, 10.1039/D5CP01570G
Seal et al., agentic Supervisor/Swarm/ReAct/Reflection, arXiv:2510.27130

loop_trace.method: AS-ALD differential-reactivity protocol (ADR-009): inhibitor adsorption screen on a-SiN (NGS) vs a-SiO2 (GS) over a gated surface ensemble, blocking coverage -> nucleation delay -> S(N).
